news.title: Vibe-coding phenomenon lifts AI startup Supabase to $10.5 billion valuation
news.snippet: Database startup Supabase announced a $500 million funding round that values the company at $10.5 billion, including the fresh capital.

news.title: Supabase Revenue 2026: $170M Est. ARR, $10.5B Valuation
news.snippet: Supabase 2026 estimated revenue: $170M ARR (up from $70M in 2025). Valuation: $10.5B. Total funding: $995M across 7 rounds Updated Jul 3,...

news.title: AI vibe coding startup Supabase, co-founded by Kiwi Paul Copplestone, raises US$500m at US$10b valuation
news.snippet: AI vibe coding startup Supabase, co-founded by Kiwi Paul Copplestone, raises US$500m at US$10b valuation · The AI-powered super ex-pats.

news.title: The New Zealand founder who couldn't sell his idea in 2014 just raised $500M at $10.5B, and Claude Code is his biggest customer
news.snippet: Supabase has raised $500 million in a Series F led by Singapore's GIC at a $10.5 billion valuation.

news.title: Exclusive: Supabase raises $100 million at $5 billion valuation as vibe coding soars
news.snippet: The vibe coding movement, as Paul Copplestone figures it, started last December—and we're already a few eras in. Recommended Video...

news.title: Supabase Raises $500 Million At $10.5 Billion Valuation To Expand Agentic Infrastructure Platform
news.snippet: Supabase, an open source Postgres development platform, announced a $500 million Series F funding round at a $10.5 billion post-money...

news.title: Database Startup Supabase in Talks to Double Valuation to $10 Billion
news.snippet: Singapore's GIC is in talks to lead an investment in database startup Supabase at a valuation of about $10 billion, double the level it...

news.title: Supabase doubles valuation to $10B in 8 months
news.snippet: Supabase, an example of an open source project becoming a fast-growing company, has greatly benefited from AI tools like Claude, Codex,...

news.title: Supabase hits $5B valuation by rejecting enterprise deals
news.snippet: Open-source database startup's CEO turns down million-dollar contracts to chase developer adoption.

news.title: AI-Native applications are rewriting the rules of storage
news.snippet: AI-native applications are shifting the balance from low-latency OLTP to scalable, S3-based storage. Supabase CEO Paul Copplestone explains...
